title: gladiolus curtifolius
intro: Gladiolus curtifolius, also known as the small-leaf sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus curtifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
